mapper.select: SELECT * FROM goods ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods (name, description, image, points_required, stock, status, material, color, target_group, season, features, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{image}, #{points}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{material}, #{color}, #{targetGroup}, #{season}, #{features}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE goods SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, image = #{image}, points_required = #{points}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status}, material = #{material}, color = #{color}, target_group = #{targetGroup}, season = #{season}, features = #{features} WHERE id = #{id}
